title: PRMP on rel-hm: 5th Dataset Evidence (user-churn + item-sales)
summary: Demo notebook for the PRMP (Predictive Residual Message Passing) experiment on the H&M Fashion relational dataset. Generates a synthetic heterogeneous graph with 3 node types (customer, article, transaction) and 2 FK edge types. Compares 3 GNN variants (Standard, PRMP, Wide control) on user-churn classification (AUROC) and item-sales regression (MAE). Includes Ridge R² analysis for FK links and visualization comparing demo results against full-scale reference values from mini_demo_data.json.
